summary: Nesoriel kept its public site and deployment surface moving with focused static-site work, documentation updates, and deployment hardening.

commits.message: Add dual-domain deployment documentation and static site foundation
commits.author: Nesoriel

commits.message: Refine CNB and EdgeOne Pages deployment workflow

highlights: Static deployment paths for GitHub Pages and EdgeOne Pages stayed aligned.
Documentation clarified how the two official domains share one content model.
The website continued to operate as the public surface for Nesoriel projects and records.
